title: crataegus biltmoreana var. stonei
intro: Crataegus biltmoreana var. stonei, also known as Biltmore hawthorn, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus biltmoreana var. stonei include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve blood lipid profiles, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Crataegus biltmoreana var. stonei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
